calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-14-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Assigned for trial. No appearance by or for defendant. JUDGE: GERALD E. RAGAN; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: June Leathley. The matter proceeds as a prove-up hearing. APPEARANCES: Plaintiff with counsel, Brenda Cruz Keith. Plaintiff ANTONIO ARTIGA is sworn and examined. Exhibits, Rental Agreement and 3-day Notice, are admitted and withdrawn. Judgment is granted as prayed. See Judgment filed and scanned this date.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-10-2003 Continued To Jul-14-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE this day.
Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo (NO SITTING JUDGE IN DEPT. 218).
Plaintiff, Antonio Artiga present with counsel, Brenda Cruz Keith.
No appearance by the Defendant.
Jury demand is stricken, trial date confirmed.
